result.markdown: --- title: "068: Winning Ugly" date: "2024-01-11" categories: - geom_tufteboxplot format: html: code-fold: true code-summary: "Code" editor: visual --- ### Data ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} unc_facts <- cbbdata::cbd_torvik_game_factors(team = "North Carolina", year = "2024") ``` ::: ### Tufte Box Plot ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} efg_plot <- unc_facts |> ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = type, y = off_efg)) + ggthemes::geom_tufteboxplot() + ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 50, linetype = "dashed") + ggplot2::coord_flip() + ggthemes::theme_clean() + ggplot2::scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Conference", "Non-Conference")) + ggplot2::theme(legend.position = "none", plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown()) + ggplot2::labs(x = "", y = "Effective Field Goal %", title = "North Carolina's worst offense shooting percentages have come in ACC play so far", subtitle = "Shows median effective field goal percentages in non-conference and conference games this season.", caption = "Bless your chart | data via cbbdata | January 11, 2023" ) + ggplot2::annotate( "label", x = 0.7, y = 55, label = "Carolina is 4-0 in ACC play without \nposting an eFG above 50 yet", size = 3.5, color = "#333333", fill = "white" ) + ggplot2::annotate( "text", x = 1.2, y = 45.4, label = "45.4 eFG \nfour games", size = 3.5, color = "#333333", ) + ggplot2::annotate( "text", x = 2.2, y = 52.5, label = "52.5 eFG \n11 games", size = 3.5, color = "#333333", ) -> efg_plot ggplot2::ggsave( "efg_plot.png", efg_plot, w = 10, h = 6, dpi = 600, type = 'cairo' ) efg_plot ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](byc_068_off_efg_files/figure-html/box-plot-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ###
